name: Cut-Out Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups C and H Powdered Sugar (unsifted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and beat until creamy.
2. Beat in sugar until smooth.
3. Add egg and vanilla; mix well.
4. Stir in flour and baking powder until thoroughly mixed.
5. Chill for 2 to 3 hours.
6. Roll dough thin on a floured board.
7. Cut into desired shapes.
8. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 375 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes.
9. To frost: Beat one egg white until foamy. Beat in 1/2 cup C and H Powdered Sugar (unsifted). Tint with food coloring if desired.
10. Paint the cookie with frosting before baking.
11. Makes 4 dozen cut-out cookies.
Reprinted with permission from:
Powdered Sugar Cookies from the C and H Sugar Kitchen
by Jean Porter
Electronic format by Karen Mintzias
